referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Airy split hero with copy on the left and a large rounded blob-masked portrait image on the right; neutral off-white background and minimal chrome.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Elegant editorial serif headline with generous line-height and compact supporting paragraph beneath.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: No formal stats strip; trust appears as small lightweight chips under hero CTAs.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Centered 2x2 icon-led service grid with minimal or no heavy card borders and lots of surrounding whitespace.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Two-column doctor spotlight area with text content and simple previous/next controls paired with a circular or rounded doctor image.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Single visual lane of concise quote cards that preserve a calm, premium rhythm instead of dense review blocks.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Off-white hero -> white services -> light neutral doctor section -> warm CTA panel -> white contact/footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Very airy spacing and restrained element density; sections should feel spacious and quiet.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded rectangle controls with soft neutral fill for secondary and solid primary for actions.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Deep navy reserved for headings and key CTAs, while aqua accent appears sparingly in chips, icon halos, and highlights.
